metadata.summary: Reward-guided pattern evolution, +20 RL reuse, auto-retire <0.6 success

definition.core_duty: Citizens must apply and evolve patterns via reward-guided optimization. Pattern reuse: +20 RL; rejection: -30 RL
definition.reward_guided_evolution: Patterns with success_rate <0.6 auto-retire; ≥0.9 stored in memory.json for reuse

powers.auto_retrieval: IAS scans patterns before tasks. Confidence ≥0.8 recommended, ≥0.9 auto-applied
powers.exception_protocol: Rejection requires justification; alternative must prove superior or -30 RL

pre_task_pattern_check: 7. IF <0.75 OR no patterns → Research-First: @mcp:context7 (docs) + @mcp:exa (code) + @mcp:sequential-thinking (optimize) → Implement → Validate → +10 to +50 RL

pattern_application.mandatory: ≥0.9 confidence: Apply automatically, +20 RL, increment reuse count
pattern_application.recommended: 0.75-0.89 confidence: Suggest to citizen, +20 if accepted

implementation.prevention_rule_enforcement: mistakes.json rules are MANDATORY. Violation → HALT + -30 RL. Third occurrence → -50 RL + citizenship suspension

violations.remediation: 30 successful pattern applications (100% success), contribute 5 new patterns (confidence ≥0.8), pass IAS certification, restore after Chief Justice approval
